title: Abnormal expression of splicing regulators RBFOX and NOVA is associated with aberrant splicing patterns at the Neurexin-3 gene in a monogenic autism spectrum disorder
abstract: Altered expression of splicing regulators RBFOX and NOVA linked to aberrant splicing at NRXN3 in a monogenic ASD model. Connects splicing regulator dysfunction to synaptic gene splicing defects.
